name: External Benchmark Harness
scope: Add a curated externalized small-reasoning benchmark fixture.
Add a benchmark runner comparing direct, random, ranker-only, and full control-loop baselines.
Generate an external benchmark report artifact.
Document the first benchmark-style receipt and the exposed proof-chain limitation.
known_limits: The task set is curated and normalized into TS-Reasoner relation form.
The result is a toy-scope receipt, not a broad benchmark claim.
The full control loop fails both small_proof_chain tasks by settling to low-tension abstentions.
next_target: v0.9 should strengthen transitive proof-chain support before broader benchmark claims.
